examples.description: JSON parse failure in flow metadata XML
Duplicate lead records found during import
Missing FLS on Custom_Score__c for integration user

user_interventions.comment: Stop using the old API endpoint for lead sync
user_interventions.proposed_action: Update integration to use v2 endpoint

known_exceptions.name: Territory Queue Missing in Sandbox
known_exceptions.context: Lead import fails when territory queues don't exist in sandbox environments
known_exceptions.recommendation: Create queue stubs during sandbox refresh or use default owner fallback

known_exceptions.name: Flow DML Limit on Bulk Account Updates
known_exceptions.context: Account trigger flow hits DML limit when processing more than 200 records
known_exceptions.recommendation: Batch Account updates in groups of 100 or use async processing

recommendations: Implement sandbox post-refresh scripts to create missing queues and assignment rules
Add bulk-safe guards to all Account-triggered flows to prevent DML limit exceptions
